{{nihongo|'''Kamunono Shrine'''|神野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamunono Shrine'''|神野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamunono Shrine'''|神野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kamunono Shrine'''|神野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamunono Shrine'''|神野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
